> ⚠️ **Privacy first — do NOT paste real personal data.** Career Agent is a privacy-focused, local-first app. Never include your real CV, LinkedIn export, API keys, tokens, or any personal information in this issue. Use **placeholder/fake data** to reproduce the problem. Issues are public.

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## What did you expect to happen?

A clear description of the expected behavior.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

_Use placeholder data only._

## Environment

- **Browser & version:** (e.g. Chrome 139, Firefox 130, Safari 18)
- **Operating system:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15)
- **Run Mode:** (local source build / Docker static container / Docker Compose stack)
- **Provider:** (OpenAI / Anthropic / Local — e.g. Ollama `llama3`)
- **App version / commit:** (if known)

## Logs or screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or console output — **with any personal data or keys removed/redacted.**

## Additional context

Anything else that might help.
